title: OutgoingMessage
description: Message produced by the user that ChatEngine hands to the connector's sendMessage(). Source: packages/core/src/domain/entities/Message.ts.

id.description: Client-generated id (used to correlate sent → status updates).

type.description: Message kind. Built-in chat input always emits 'text'.

data.description: Type-specific payload. For text messages: { text: string }.
